gaps: Implementation should prove the no-port-forward web app URL against the actual kind host port mapping, not just the Kubernetes Service object.
Implementation should include fixture coverage for blocked final-review outcomes and structured MCP fields taking precedence over prose fallbacks.

summary: Accepted. The update-web-app OpenSpec artifacts align with the stated goal: they require the web app to consume current scion-ops MCP structured fields, preserve final-review and validation semantics, and become part of the kind/kustomize control-plane install with lifecycle tasks and no-spend smoke coverage. No blocking issues were found in the spec artifacts.
